_comment: DEV workflow: set the plugin's `plugins[]` entry in the DEPLOYED branding's manifest.json to this, upload that branding ONCE, then run `npm run dev`. Changes hot-reload with no re-upload. Requirements: the vite dev server must be RUNNING (a localhost entry is invalid otherwise), use Chrome (it allows http://localhost from an https page), and join via 'Join with Browser'. Switch back to manifest.snippet.json (relative path) for the real deployable ZIP.
